content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 adnovara: Senior Google Ads Manager – Scaling Campaigns Anywhere in the World Alabama Facebook Paid Ads, Social Media Marketing, and Google Ads All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5135/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> New York <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.adnovara.com/">https://www.adnovara.com/</a> </p> <p>Adnovara is hiring an experienced Google Ads Specialist to manage and scale performance campaigns for lead generation and eCommerce brands. Responsibilities Manage and optimize Google Ads campaigns (Search, Shopping, Performance Max) Improve ROAS, lower CPA, and scale profitable campaigns Set up and manage GA4, GTM, and conversion tracking Analyze campaign data, search terms, audiences, and performance trends Requirements Proven Google Ads experience managing real ad budgets Strong understanding of ROAS, CPA, attribution, and tracking Experience with GA4 and GTM Ability to work independently and communicate clearly Bonus Skills Meta Ads experience Funnel or landing page optimization Agency experience What We Offer Fully remote position Long-term opportunity Flexible structure (hourly or fixed) Performance-based growth opportunities Compensation Flexible hourly or monthly compensation depending on experience, skill level, and campaign performance. Hourly rate range: $45–$70/hour Open to long-term collaboration and performance-based increases for strong results. To Apply Please send: CV or portfolio Highest monthly budget managed Campaign results or case studies Experience with GA4/GTM Shortlisted candidates will be invited to the next hiring stage.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/adnovara-senior-google-ads-manager-scaling-campaigns">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/adnovara-senior-google-ads-manager-scaling-campaigns</a></p> Tue, 12 May 2026 04:09:38 +0000 Thu, 11 Jun 2026 04:09:38 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/adnovara-senior-google-ads-manager-scaling-campaigns https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/adnovara-senior-google-ads-manager-scaling-campaigns Tortuga Forma: Sales & Operations Assistant Anywhere in the World Alabama Admin, Excel, Shopify, QuickBooks, and Accounts Payable / Accounts Receivable Sales and Marketing Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5130/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Brooklyn, NY <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://www.tortugaforma.co">https://www.tortugaforma.co</a> </p> <p>Tortuga Forma is hiring for a motivated Sales &amp; Operations Assistant seeking steady work to support a long-term career in administration and/or sales. This is a part-time, remote role requiring 10 - 15 hours per week. We are looking for a longer term commitment of 2+ years.</p> <p>We are:</p> <ul> <li> <p>A small team of focused individuals who believe that regular and clear communication is the key to our company's success.</p> </li> <li> <p>Dedicated to training and supporting each other to achieve team and personal goals</p> </li> <li> <p>Cheerleaders who celebrate team and individual wins</p> </li> <li> <p>Inspired by contemporary design, informed by historical design, and excited by online retail.</p> </li> </ul> <p>You are:</p> <ul> <li> <p>A self-starter who can work and think independently, is highly organized, and detail-oriented</p> </li> <li> <p>Rigorous at following up and love solving problems and troubleshooting for customers</p> </li> <li> <p>Willing to take challenges head-on, both big and small</p> </li> <li> <p>Someone who asks thoughtful questions, open to receiving feedback, and is eager to learn</p> </li> <li> <p>Reliable at showing up for meetings, accountable to responsibilities and tasks</p> </li> </ul> <p>Sales &amp; Operations Responsibilities:</p> <ul> <li> <p>Order logistics such as entry, tracking, and maintenance</p> </li> <li> <p>Work with the warehouses to obtain shipping quotes, stock level accuracy, and ensure orders are fulfilled properly and on time.</p> </li> <li> <p>Dropship account maintenance including: allocating inventory, reporting on SKU sell through velocity across 2 - 3 key dropship accounts, addressing late shipments and customer queries, tracking returns.</p> </li> <li> <p>New dropship account setup including creating the catalog (image specs, product descriptions), learning backend systems, ensuring all information is accurately reflected on partner sites.&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Identification of sales opportunities across wholesale and seasonal dropship marketing opportunities with initial outreach and follow ups.</p> </li> <li> <p>Resolving DTC customer issues, returns processing, and issuing refunds after returns have been received.</p> </li> <li> <p>Monthly data sorting to match dropship and wholesale sales&nbsp; with payouts received each month.</p> </li> <li> <p>Use of Quickbooks Online for dropship payment matching for AR</p> </li> </ul> <p>Requirements:</p> <ul> <li> <p>1-2 years of experience in sales or operations, internship ok</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong writing skills and is comfortable communicating with external customers</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with sales channel backends ( Shopify, Facebook/IG Shop, Pipedrive) is a plus.</p> </li> </ul> <p>How to Apply:</p> <ul> <li> <p>Resume</p> </li> <li> <p>Cover letter</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/tortuga-forma-sales-operations-assistant">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/tortuga-forma-sales-operations-assistant</a></p> Mon, 11 May 2026 14:27:47 +0000 Wed, 10 Jun 2026 14:27:47 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/tortuga-forma-sales-operations-assistant https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/tortuga-forma-sales-operations-assistant Infiniti Group Ltd: Entry Level Junior Trader (Remote) Anywhere in the World Merseyside Cryptocurrency All Other Remote Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5128/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Infiniti Group Ltd <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://infinitiownerclub.com">https://infinitiownerclub.com</a> </p> <p><strong>Application link</strong>: <a title="https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely" href="https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely">https://infinitiownerclub.com/work/weworkremotely</a><br><br></p> <div class="vacancy-intro reveal reveal-delay-2 is-visible"> <p>Infiniti Group operates at the crossroads of digital asse
